title: Platform Engineer & Server Administrator
description: Solely orchestrating the end-to-end lifecycle of all university applications—from system architecture and scalable design to fully automated production deployment.
achievements: Solely direct application lifecycles across 10+ core structural platforms, encompassing massive legacy migrations, robust feature development, and entirely new fault-tolerant portals.
Architected the JNTU-GV E-Payment Gateway from the ground up to securely process thousands of high-volume financial transactions with zero-defect routing.
Manage complete, automated CI/CD DevOps pipelines across Nginx/Linux clusters, guaranteeing a rigorous 99.99% high-availability SLA for over 40,000 active students and faculty.

title: Data Engineering & Platform Developer
description: Concurrently engineering massive data pipelines and governmental APIs to securely process and distribute university-wide examination results.
achievements: Architect complex data aggregation systems specifically designed to parse, validate, and analyze extremely heavy datasets consisting of continuous university examination results.
Engineered highly secure, scalable RESTful API endpoints dedicated to issuing critical student result data directly to interconnected governmental data portals.
Ensured absolute data integrity and zero-defect query performance when handling the sensitive academic records of thousands of students under high load.

title: Server Administrator & Full Stack Developer Intern
description: Collaborated with cross-functional development teams to build, seamlessly migrate, and harden the foundational digital architecture for JNTU-GV.
achievements: Engineered the central JNTU-GV CMS module and globally deployed 14 highly customized, high-traffic PHP university sub-domains sustaining 10,000+ daily concurrent requests.
Successfully executed 100% zero-downtime structural server migrations while aggressively monitoring high-load production clusters alongside development teams.
Developed robust RESTful backend architectures and enforced uncompromising cybersecurity algorithms (AES), completely securing confidential records for multi-tier administrative systems.

title: Cybersecurity & Cloud Systems Intern
description: Analyzed cloud infrastructure security and implemented modern cybersecurity practices.
achievements: Conducted vulnerability assessments and utilized advanced cyber forensics tools for incident analysis.
Modeled cloud computing infrastructure setups while applying robust cyber defense strategies.
Drafted security management policies to mitigate network attacks and data breaches.

title: Research Intern (Data Pipelines & Deep Learning)
description: Developed and trained highly optimized deep learning models for detecting pulmonary diseases from raw X-ray data.
achievements: Built resilient data processing pipelines for large-scale computer vision datasets.
Architected Convolutional Neural Networks, aggressively tuning hyperparameters for optimal resource usage.
Achieved a 91% accuracy rate in multi-class classification (Covid-19, Tuberculosis, Pneumonia) on production-ready models.

title: Automation Engineering Intern
description: Engineered automated test suites for large-scale web applications to streamline CI/CD validation phases.
achievements: Created robust, repeatable automated test scripts utilizing Katalon Studio and modern frameworks.
Dramatically improved test coverage and significantly reduced manual regression testing time.
Integrated with cross-functional teams to identify, reproduce, and resolve complex systemic defects.
